description: إصلاح المحتوى المفقود (\n و \r\n) بعد عملية الدمج
command_preview:
$file = 'C:\Users\Revexn\CodeAnalyzer\code_analyzer.py'; $content = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText($file, [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8); $fixes = @(); $content = $content.Replace('content.split("")', 'content.split("
")'); $fixes += 'Fixed: content.split("") -> content.split("
")'; $content = $content.Replace('has_crlf = "" in content', 'has_crlf = "
" in content'); $fixes += 'Fixed: has_crlf check'; $content = $content.Replace('has_lf = "" in content.replace("", "")', 'has_lf = "
" in content.replace("
", "")'); $fixes += 'Fixed: has_lf check'; [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText($file, $content, [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8); $fixes | ForEach-Object { Write-Output $_ }; Write-Output 'Content fixes applied!'
output:
Fixed: content.split("") -> content.split("\n")
Fixed: has_crlf check
Fixed: has_lf check
Content fixes applied!
